qa_pairs.question: Which web browsers are supported for accessing Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Firefox and Chrome browsers are supported for accessing Arbutus Cloud, while Safari and Edge may work but have not been validated.

qa_pairs.question: What resources are pre-created for users in the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: In the New Arbutus Cloud, your Project (Tenant), Network, and Router will be pre-created for you.

qa_pairs.question: Why might new OpenStack Security Groups be necessary when migrating to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: New Security Groups (OpenStack’s firewall rules) may be required in the New Arbutus Cloud because its floating IP range is different from that of the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.
